name: The Advisory Board Company
description: The Advisory Board Company is a leading provider of best-practice research, technology, and consulting services to the healthcare and higher education industries. Through its membership programs, the company collaborates with industry leaders to identify and implement solutions to their most pressing operational, clinical, and financial challenges. In 2017, the company's healthcare business was acquired by Optum, a division of UnitedHealth Group, while its education business, EAB, was acquired by Bain Capital.
